holdings.infoBox: EGUS is an equity ETF with a total of 97 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.99%, Apple at 13.05%, Amazon.com at 6.59%, Alphabet at 5.57%, and Broadcom at 5.55%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA Growth ETF (EGUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Growth Extended ESG Focus index. The fund is a passively managed fund that tracks an index of US growth stocks with certain environmental, social, and governance criteria. The fund aims to maximizes its ESG exposure. EGUS was launched on Jan 31, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Growth Extended ESG Focus Index
